title: Glacials' Mining Dimension
description: A mod which adds a gigantic cave dimension perfectly suited for mining.
body: This mod adds a new dimension, which is perfectly suited for minning, since it is a gigantic cave. To access this dimension you will need to surround wooden pickaxes with stone bricks in a crafting table, which results in the gate to the mine. When combined with the interdimensional pickaxe, craftable with an iron pickaxe and some ender pearls and ender eyes, you will be able to make a portal to the mining dimension.
